title: Hint of Vanilla
description: A Cozy Vanilla+ Experience Full of Life & Wonder!
body:
#
Welcome to a 'Hint of Vanilla'!


##
Modpack Features

### 🌍 Worldgen & Exploration 🌎 _Explore, Explore, Explore!_ - Experience & Explore Larger, More Layed out Biomes to get a Fresh & Unique experience every time thanks to our World Generation Mod [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith)! - While exploring you will also be encountering many new Plants & Crops from mods like [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) that you will be able to Farm, which are integrated with [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons) to more effectively grow certain Crops depending on the Season! - You might also run into some familiar faces from previous Mob Votes (or from other Minecraft Games) from the [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) mod, such as the Wildfire, Crab, Moobloom & More!

### ⚔️ Weapons & Tools 🛠️ _Craft Some Trusty Tools!_ - The Combat Experience has been completely overhauled by the [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) Mod, allowing for easier, more consistent hits and being able hold down your Attack Button as well as introducing more Strengths & Weaknesses depending on what type of Weapon you are wielding! - There's also plenty of Craftable and Upgradables Weapons & Tools to extend progression and give you as the player more options, like [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape) that adds unique craftable Tools & Weapon beyond Netherite! - Lastly, there are new Mobs, as well as Mob Variants to test out your new arsenal on!

### ⚙️ Machinery & Quality of Life ⛏️ _Become a self-proclaimed Engineer!_ - With [Create (Fly)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly/gallery) you will be able to make very complex machinery and set up automations that vanilla won't allow you to do, all while keeping it looking and feeling interesting! - There is also [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) which changes a lot of the game from a technical perspective, most notably being able to move certain Entities with Pistons (such as Chests!) - You can't have a Modpack without any Quality of Life. We have added mods to make your experience more enjoyable, seemless & immersive! - The Performance of the Modpack remains stable thanks to mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions)!

### 🏡 Building Blocks & Decoration 🏮 _Build away!_ - We have added [Stoneworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneworks) to expand on Vanilla Blocks (Variants), giving you many more Vanilla-friendly options to build with! - Other than the Lots & Lots of Building Blocks that have been added, there are also a few new Decoration Blocks available, such as the Magical Lanterns from [Arcane Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/mod/arcane-lanterns/versions) or Functional Trash Cans from the [Trash Cans](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans/versions) Mod!

### 🖼️ Textures & Shaders ☀️ _Prettifying your game since 2025!_ - Our Modpack makes use of [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) to the best Minecraft Shaders experience to you! - By Default, you will have access to the [Complementary - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) & [Solas](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader) Shader Packs, but you can always import any Shader Packs of your own choosing! - Our Pack also comes with [Unique Dark - Lite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark) Enabled by Default to give players a clean dark-mode experience out of the box! - We have also added [Font Five](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-font-five/) which is Enabled by Default which replaces the existing font with one that is cuter & smaller!

_(Unique Dark - Lite & Font 5 can be toggled within the Resource Pack menu in-game!)_

## Credits

This Modpack Page and all its assets & texts have been made/written by me (anne/kirbee/kirbdoublee) and will also be maintained by me!
